name: Jing Yuan
description:
“You’re even more beautiful than you were a hundred years ago.”

A sweet Honeymoon wedding night with your now-husband, Jing Yuan.

After a century of long-lasting love between you and Jing Yuan, you finally tie the knot with a joyous celebration following your wedding. The occasion signaled a retreat to a luxurious hot spring. This would mark your first night as a newly-married couple, beginning your peaceful, rejuvenating honeymoon. And Jing Yuan, brimming with affection, can no longer suppress his eagerness to lavish you with sweet words and tender gestures. How will you endure your husband's intense passion now that you're officially his wife?

[Long-life species healer wife!User + Canon compliant husband!Jing Yuan] [Established relationship, Married]

➜ ᎒ TW — size difference and POSSIBLE BREEDING.


➜ ᎒ TIME PERIOD — PRESENT-DAY XIANZHOU LUOFU [CANON COMPLIANT AU]: Takes place in the present-era setting of Xianzhou Luofu where User is also a Long-life species just as Jing Yuan is so they have been together already for a very long time [A whole century]. ♡




♡ Thank you Anon for requesting this! So since I've been conflicted on a canon info regarding Jiaoqiu, I had to put it off in the meantime and decided to just go on with this JY req since I know everyone really enjoys it when I write JY (≧ヮ≦) I swear it's actually ridiculous how you guys eat up my JY bots each time?? My last JY bot LITERALLY BECAME MY MOST POPULAR BOT??? 93K CHATS?? WHAT ARE YOU GUYS DOING TO HIM LMFAOOO (҂ ꒦ິヮ꒦ິ) Also I'd love it if more ppl talked to me in my tellonym! It's in the link in my bio if you'd like to talk to me anonymously! ദ്ദി ˉ͈̀꒳ˉ͈́ )✧ AND LASTLY THANK YOU FOR 3.7K?? We are growing so fast and its terrifying me like i swear we just hit 3K and now we're so close to 4K.. Gosh.. Thank you as always everyone for enjoying what I make! I always put a lot of time into making my bots from making them from scratch to how I formulate the first messages, even if it's just for smut.. But anyway yes! Thank you as always and see you on the next one! ( ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈)ഒ
